title: Organized Tabs
description: Re-organizes the items in the Minecraft creative inventory.
body:
Organized Tabs is a lightweight mod that reorganizes the creative inventory by moving items to more fitting tabs and grouping related items together.

Other changes include:

Spawn Eggs are now ordered by mob category, rather than alphabetical

Dragon Eggs and Spawners are now available in Decoration Blocks

NOTE: The Fabric API, while compatible, is not needed to use this mod!
